# Pregnancy (pregnancy)

**41 rules.** Category: reproductive

| `st_johns_wort` | ingredient_quality_map | avoid | probable | Not recommended during pregnancy | NCCIH notes potential increased birth-defect risk and major drug interaction potential. |

| `yohimbe` | ingredient_quality_map | contraindicated | probable | Do not use during pregnancy | Yohimbe has stimulant and hemodynamic effects with concerning maternal-fetal risk profile. |
